source: Adaptation of 'Not So Super... Man' (Steeleblazer/Zanfadar/Lawson, MFMC) — own 3D-CGI version, one image per page, original dialogue.
format_note: ONE image per page — every page is a single full-bleed splash panel. Insert pages marked GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE are a single image internally divided into 3 vertical sub-panels (left to right) showing the SAME body region growing stage by stage.
growth_page_target: 45-55% (origin/mixed per script-breakdown §4.6); actual growth-beat pages: 19/46 = 41% + 5 strength-feat aftermath pages

transformation_metadata.oversize_note: Per feedback_chest_oversize_compensate: prompts over-spec one tier above target. Final-form refs go to user review for further juicing BEFORE production.

adult_handling: steamy-but-covered: all intimate beats framed suggestive/implied — torn-but-covering wardrobe, silhouettes, embraces, exterior cutaway. No nudity.
emblem: ORIGINAL gold double-chevron delta emblem (two nested upward chevrons in a diamond outline) — NO letterforms, NO S-shield.

cast.name: Supraman
cast.wardrobe: royal-blue fitted hero suit, crimson cape + trunks + boots, gold belt, gold double-chevron delta emblem on chest
cast.look: square-jawed classic hero, black side-parted hair, tall lean-muscular (male athletic, NOT hyper)

cast.name: Dana Lane
cast.wardrobe: ACT1: white blouse + charcoal pencil skirt (progressively torn but always covering). FROM PAGE 20: Supraman's spare royal-blue suit stretched over her physique, gold chevron emblem, crimson cape
cast.look: jet-black chin-length bob with straight bangs, hazel eyes, strikingly beautiful; grows tier 2→4→6→9 across the story

cast.name: Dee-Dee / Destroya
cast.wardrobe: PRE: white lab coat over black top. AS DESTROYA (page 24+): black side-laced corset, black choker, black wrist cuffs, black-and-white striped thigh-high boots
cast.look: big curly blonde mane, ice-blue eyes, cruel smirk, strikingly beautiful; tier 3 → 8 as Destroya

cast.name: Dex Doomer
cast.wardrobe: slate-grey tailored business suit, striped tie
cast.look: bald, heavy brow, smug corporate villain

cast.name: Timmy Olson
cast.wardrobe: tan jacket, red bow tie, vintage flashbulb camera

props.description: chunky retro-future ray cannon: brushed chrome barrel with three cooling rings, glowing teal coil core, black grips — handheld-cannon scale
oversized matte-black barbell, six thick disc plates per side, teal holo readout on the collar

locations.description: villain laboratory: concrete walls, steel gantry, cable bundles, the Disinto-Ray rig aimed at a bolted interrogation chair, harsh overhead floods
spartan staff quarters off the lab: steel-frame bed, concrete walls, one caged wall lamp, warm low light
night exterior of the brutalist lab block: cracked facade, one lit top-floor window, dust drifting, moonlit
Hall of Justice locker room: glass suit-display cases (one empty hanger), brushed steel lockers
Hall of Justice training hall: vaulted ceiling, graviton weight rack, holo readout pillars, polished floor with crater dents
backup Doomer lab: wall of security monitors, workbench with the rebuilt Disinto-Ray prototype, red accent lighting
downtown avenue: glass office towers, overturned yellow taxi, cracked asphalt crater, scattered debris, late-afternoon sun

panels.action: COVER. Foreground: drained Supraman slumped, suit torn. Mid: tier-9 Dana towers behind him, hand on his shoulder, smiling. Back-right: Destroya (tier 8, corset) pressing the graviton barbell overhead.
panels.notes: Title cover — composite of final states. Title text added by page-composer.
panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit stretched (final); supraman: suit torn; dee-dee: corset ensemble

panels.action: Dana (tier 2, blouse + skirt) bound to the interrogation chair under the Disinto-Ray barrel. Doomer gestures grandly in the foreground; Dee-Dee in lab coat at the console behind.

dialogue.text: Cheer up, Miss Lane. Tonight you make scientific history.
You won't get away with this, Doomer!

panels.costume_state: dana: blouse+skirt intact, roped; doomer: grey suit; dee-dee: lab coat

panels.action: Supraman smashes THROUGH the concrete wall, fist first, debris exploding toward camera, cape snapping.

dialogue.text: Let her go, Doomer. Last warning.

panels.costume_state: supraman: suit pristine

panels.action: Doomer fires the Disinto-Ray. Supraman throws himself in front of bound Dana — the teal beam strikes his back and visibly REFRACTS through his chest into her, both lit by the discharge.

dialogue.text: Then share the demonstration!

panels.costume_state: supraman: suit pristine; dana: blouse intact, roped

panels.action: Smoke clears. Supraman on one knee, steaming, drained. Dana still roped to the chair, head swimming. Far background: the Doomjet hatch sealing as the villains flee.

dialogue.text: Ugh... like my bones went through a blender...
Supraman... something feels... off.

panels.costume_state: supraman: suit scorched at back; dana: blouse intact, roped

panels.action: Tight on Dana in the chair: flushed cheeks, wide eyes, breath caught — a faint teal shimmer crawling along her forearms under the ropes.

dialogue.text: Hot... it's like sunlight under my skin...

panels.costume_state: dana: blouse intact, ropes straining

panels.action: GROWTH 1 EVENT. Dana stands up THROUGH the ropes — they snap off her swelling frame (tier 4: visible athletic muscle now filling the blouse, sleeves tight). Chair tips behind her. Supraman gapes in the background.

dialogue.text: Actually... I feel SUPER.
Great galaxies...

panels.costume_state: dana: blouse tight at seams, ropes snapped off; supraman: suit scorched

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: one image, three vertical sub-panels, the SAME right arm left-to-right. Stage 1: toned forearm-to-bicep flex inside a tightening blouse sleeve. Stage 2: bicep ballooning, seam splitting at the shoulder. Stage 3: arm fully swollen athletic-hyper, sleeve burst to threads, veins surfacing, sweat sheen.
captions: Every heartbeat poured more of his power into her.
panels.notes: In-image 3-panel progressive device. Same arm, same angle, ONLY the size changes.
panels.costume_state: dana: blouse R sleeve bursts across stages (intact->split->gone)

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, Dana's midsection in profile. Stage 1: blouse taut over a soft waist. Stage 2: fabric stretching as abdominal ridges press through. Stage 3: blouse hem parted, carved eight-pack abs exposed, skin glistening.
panels.notes: In-image 3-panel progressive. Keep blouse covering the chest — midriff only exposed.
panels.costume_state: dana: blouse hem parts across stages, midriff bare by stage 3

panels.action: Dana flexes both arms in a power pose, rope shreds at her feet; Supraman steps close, hand on her shoulder, equal parts awe and worry. Their eyelines lock along a diagonal.

dialogue.text: The beam bounced my power into you. It should wear off... I think.
And if I don't want it to?

panels.costume_state: dana: blouse torn-but-covering; supraman: suit scorched

panels.action: Mid-embrace. Dana's eyes fly open against his cheek — the teal shimmer reignites along her shoulders, stronger.

dialogue.text: Oh— it's happening AGAIN—

panels.costume_state: dana: blouse torn-but-covering; supraman: suit scorched

panels.action: GROWTH 2 EVENT. Dana surges to tier 6 — head thrown back, fists clenched, blouse and skirt seams splitting at shoulder and hip (still covering), hem lines snapping. Supraman shields his face from flying buttons in the foreground.

dialogue.text: Bigger— I'm getting BIGGER!

panels.costume_state: dana: blouse+skirt seams split at shoulder/hip, still covering; supraman: suit scorched

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, Dana's chest and shoulders front-on. Stage 1: blouse straining across her chest, top button gone. Stage 2: chest and pec shelf swelling outward, placket gapping, fabric pulled to silk-thin. Stage 3: blouse knotted remnant barely containing a massively expanded bust + flared collarbone shelf, every seam blown but coverage intact.
panels.notes: Over-spec chest size per compensation rule. COVERED at every stage.
panels.costume_state: dana: blouse strains to knotted remnant across stages, chest covered throughout

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, her back. Stage 1: blouse back taut, shoulder blades defined. Stage 2: lats flaring wide, back seam splitting downward. Stage 3: full cobra back exposed through the split, trap mountains, blouse hanging on as sleeves.
panels.costume_state: dana: blouse back seam splits across stages, hangs as sleeves by stage 3

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, hip-to-calf in profile. Stage 1: pencil skirt taut over toned thighs. Stage 2: quad sweep and glutes stretching the skirt, side-slit tearing upward. Stage 3: skirt reduced to a secure wrap, diamond calves and huge sweeping quads exposed, heels snapped flat.
panels.notes: Wrap stays covering hips/glutes — slit shows thigh only.
panels.costume_state: dana: skirt tears to secure wrap across stages, hips/glutes covered

panels.action: Dana, tier 6 in torn-but-covering remnants, lifts his chin with one finger, leaning down into his space — he's flustered. Heat, confidence, a held breath between them.

dialogue.text: We should... find you something to wear—
Why? I have never felt MORE dressed for the occasion.

panels.costume_state: dana: torn-but-covering remnants; supraman: suit scorched

panels.action: Shot past the door frame (out-of-focus foreground): Dana carries Supraman bridal-style toward the steel-frame bed, his cape trailing on the floor, her silhouette rimmed in warm lamplight. Both still clothed in torn-but-covering remnants.

dialogue.text: I have waited a LONG time to sweep you off your feet.

panels.costume_state: dana: torn-but-covering remnants; supraman: suit scorched

panels.action: CUTAWAY GAG. The brutalist lab block at night. One top-floor window glows warm. Fresh cracks spider across the facade, dust puffs from the roofline, a chunk of cornice drops past a startled pigeon.
captions: Structural engineers would later have QUESTIONS.
panels.costume_state: n/a (no characters in frame)

panels.action: Morning after, Hall of Justice locker room. Supraman hobbles past the suit display cases using a locker for support — hair wrecked, one boot on. One display case holds an EMPTY hanger.

dialogue.text: Note to self: never say 'show me what you've got' to a supercharged Dana Lane.
...wait. Where is my spare suit?

panels.costume_state: supraman: suit rumpled, hair wrecked, one boot

panels.action: REVEAL. Dana — tier 6, wearing HIS spare suit stretched skin-tight, cape and all — presses the loaded graviton barbell overhead, beaming. Readout pillar: MAX. Supraman's stunned face small in the foreground doorway.

dialogue.text: Morning, sleepyhead! Hope you don't mind — mine kept exploding.
That's... my MAX setting...

panels.costume_state: dana: HIS spare suit stretched skin-tight + cape; supraman: primary suit

panels.action: Side-by-side bicep comparison: his earnest full flex vs her relaxed arm simply RESTING larger beside it. She grins down at him along the diagonal.

dialogue.text: I AM flexing.
I'm not.

panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit stretched; supraman: suit

panels.action: Backup lab. Over Doomer's shoulder: the monitor wall replays Dana snapping the ropes. Dee-Dee (lab coat, tier 3) leans at the workbench where the rebuilt Disinto-Ray prototype sits under a work lamp.

dialogue.text: The beam re-routed his power. Which means power can be POURED.
Poured into WHOM, exactly?

panels.costume_state: dee-dee: lab coat over black top; doomer: grey suit

panels.action: Dee-Dee stands square in the prototype's teal beam, lab coat whipping, arms spread, lit up; Doomer at the trigger console behind, grinning.

dialogue.text: All of it, Dex. I have EARNED this.

panels.costume_state: dee-dee: lab coat, whipping in beam

panels.action: DEE-DEE TRANSFORMATION. She erupts to tier 8 — lab coat blasting off in shreds revealing the black laced corset ensemble beneath, curly mane wild, fists up, monitors cracking from proximity.

dialogue.text: YES. Finally a body that fits my ambitions!

panels.costume_state: dee-dee: lab coat blasted to shreds -> black corset ensemble revealed

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, Dee-Dee's shoulders and arms front-on. Stage 1: lab-coat sleeves tight over toned arms. Stage 2: boulder shoulders splitting the sleeves at the seam. Stage 3: bare hyper delts and biceps, shredded sleeve cuffs still ringing her wrists like trophies.
panels.costume_state: dee-dee: corset; coat sleeves burst across stages, cuffs remain stage 3

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, thigh-high boots and glutes from behind-low. Stage 1: striped boots fitted over athletic legs. Stage 2: quads and glutes swelling, boot shafts creaking, stitching strained. Stage 3: hyper legs — boots burst at the top seam, corset bottom holding coverage, diamond calves.
panels.notes: Corset bottom + boots keep full coverage throughout.
panels.costume_state: dee-dee: corset+striped thigh boots; boot top seams burst stage 3, coverage held

panels.action: IMPLIED, NOT GRAPHIC: shot past Destroya's massive forearm (foreground, out of focus) as she lifts Doomer by his collar one-handed, his shoes off the floor, monitor light flickering across her smirk. His silhouette goes limp against the monitor wall glow.

dialogue.text: New org chart, Dex. There is a NEW Doom in town — call me DESTROYA.

panels.notes: Keep violence implied — silhouette + caption carry it.
panels.costume_state: dee-dee: corset ensemble; doomer: grey suit

panels.action: Arm-wrestle across a steel table — his whole body straining, her elbow planted casually, chin in her free hand. The tabletop crumples under her grip.

dialogue.text: I... am going... EASY on you—
Sweetie. The table disagrees.

panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit stretched; supraman: suit

panels.action: He deadlifts the graviton bar to his knees, shaking, floor cracking under his boots; behind him Dana holds an identical loaded bar overhead ONE-HANDED while checking her nails on the other.

dialogue.text: GNNGH— it feels like lifting a SKYSCRAPER—
Try two. Builds character.

panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit stretched; supraman: suit

panels.action: She has him wrapped in a gentle, inescapable bear-hug from behind, his arms pinned, boots off the ground; he taps her forearm.

dialogue.text: Okay! Uncle! UNCLE!
Then it's settled — I take patrol today, champ.

panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit stretched; supraman: suit

panels.action: RAMPAGE. Destroya mid-avenue, holding an overturned yellow taxi overhead one-handed (foreground wheel out of focus), office glass raining around her. Street otherwise emptied — abandoned cars, scattered briefcases.

dialogue.text: Citizens of this city! Your new management has ARRIVED!

panels.costume_state: dee-dee: corset ensemble (Destroya)

panels.action: Supraman lies flattened in a fresh crater, cape over his face; Destroya stands over him dusting her palms, one striped boot planted on his chest emblem.

dialogue.text: THIS is the city's finest? Dex lost to THIS?
Oh — Dex says hi, by the way. Posthumously.

panels.costume_state: dee-dee: corset; supraman: suit dusted, cratered

panels.action: Dana descends from the sky fists-first between Destroya and downed Supraman, cape flaring, landing crack radiating from her boots. The two huge women lock eyes; he peers up from the crater between them.

dialogue.text: Step AWAY from the nice man, Dee-Dee.
The pet reporter got an upgrade! Adorable.

panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit; dee-dee: corset; supraman: suit battered

panels.action: The brawl — both women mid-swing along a hard diagonal, her fist meeting Destroya's crossed guard, shockwave ring blowing dust off the asphalt.

dialogue.text: I'm the ORIGINAL recipe now — you're the knock-off!
Funny. You hit like an intern.

panels.costume_state: dana: spare suit scuffed; dee-dee: corset

panels.action: Destroya dominates: one hand chokeslamming Dana into the asphalt (crater webbing out), the other backhanding Supraman through an office window line — three storeys of glass detonating.

dialogue.text: I'll deal with you TWO at a TIME!

panels.costume_state: dana: suit scuffed; supraman: suit + glass scuffs; dee-dee: corset

panels.action: Shot past Destroya's striped boot (foreground) pressing Supraman's shoulders into rubble; behind her, Dana drags herself up the rim of the crater, suit scuffed, eyes furious.

dialogue.text: Stay DOWN, little man. The grown-ups are talking.

panels.costume_state: dana: suit dusty, crater grime; supraman: suit battered; dee-dee: corset

panels.action: Supraman rockets AWAY low over the rooftops, jaw set, torn cape snapping — while behind him Destroya hammers Dana through a brick storefront column.

dialogue.text: Hold on, Dana. There is exactly ONE thing left that can out-muscle her.
HA! Your boyfriend just LEFT!

panels.costume_state: supraman: cape torn; dana: suit battered; dee-dee: corset

panels.action: Supraman back-from-the-lab, braced on one knee with the Disinto-Ray prototype shoulder-mounted, pouring its FULL teal charge into kneeling Dana — she's haloed in light; Destroya whirls in the background.

dialogue.text: You're the strongest of us, Dana. So TAKE THE REST OF IT!

panels.costume_state: dana: suit battered pre-final; supraman: cape torn; dee-dee: corset

panels.action: Dana rises inside the beam-glow, head back, teeth gritted in ecstatic strain, suit seams beginning to lift OFF her swelling shoulders, hair floating in the energy wash.

dialogue.text: It's... EVERYTHING... and it's MINE!

panels.costume_state: dana: suit shoulder seams lifting in beam glow

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, her right arm mid-beam. Stage 1: tier-7 bicep splitting the blue sleeve. Stage 2: sleeve gone — bicep doubling, veins like cables, energy crackling across the skin. Stage 3: TIER-9 hyper arm, forearm wider than her head, fist clenched, asphalt cracking under the static.
captions: The last of the ray. The last limit.
panels.costume_state: dana: suit R sleeve bursts across stages

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, torso front-on. Stage 1: gold chevron emblem stretching wide across her ballooning chest. Stage 2: emblem distorted drum-tight, suit fibers tearing at the sternum line, abs erupting below. Stage 3: TIER-9 torso — colossal chest shelf and cobblestone abs, the emblem heroically intact at the center of the strained suit.
panels.notes: Suit holds coverage. Emblem survives — brand moment.
panels.costume_state: dana: suit torso strained across stages, emblem intact

panels.action: GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, her back with cape mounts. Stage 1: lats flaring, cape clasps straining. Stage 2: back widening past the cape's hem, one clasp PINGING off. Stage 3: TIER-9 cobra back in full eclipse of the sun, cape re-hung off one heroic shoulder, suit back panel split clean down the spine line (musculature visible, coverage maintained at hips).
panels.costume_state: dana: suit back splits down spine across stages, cape one clasp

panels.action: FINAL REVEAL. Tier-9 Dana — now visibly LARGER than Destroya — stands in the settling beam-haze and catches Destroya's full-power haymaker in one open palm without sliding an inch. Shockwave ring. Destroya's face: first crack of fear.

dialogue.text: I said it nicely once. HANDS OFF MY SUPRAMAN.
...oh no.

panels.costume_state: dana: suit final battle-state torn-but-covering, emblem intact; dee-dee: corset

panels.action: THE UPPERCUT. Dana's follow-through fills the lower-left third of the frame; Destroya is a flailing silhouette rocketing into the empty sky that dominates the rest, already past the tower tops.

dialogue.text: Enjoy the view!

panels.costume_state: dana: suit final battle-state; dee-dee: corset (airborne)

panels.action: Dust settling, sunset rim-light. Tier-9 Dana cradles Supraman in both arms; he reaches up to touch her jaw. Foreheads meeting, both smiling, his cape draped over her forearm.

dialogue.text: I guess you saved ME this time.
Get used to it. You'll always be MY hero.

panels.costume_state: dana: suit final battle-state; supraman: suit battered

panels.action: FINALE. Shot past Timmy Olson's raised flash camera (foreground, mid-flash): Dana and Supraman pose together in the settling dust — her arm around his shoulders, his hand proud on her forearm, both grinning at the lens.

dialogue.text: Dana Lane?! Are you the city's new protector?!
We protect EACH OTHER, Timmy. We're a SUPRA-TEAM.

panels.costume_state: dana: suit final battle-state; supraman: suit battered; timmy: tan jacket

camera_note: Mean-distance sits above the multi-panel benchmark BY FORMAT: one full-bleed image per page means every page carries establishing duty. Body-region beats are all ecu-region per L20; reveal beats full-close per the beat table. Accepted intentionally.
